name: Astral-Naganadel (Void Sovereign)
description: A high-tier synthesis of Naganadel and Necrozma. It exists as the primary needle of the void, capable of piercing the dimensional veil to harvest Ultra Energy from the multiverse core.
originLore: Emerging from the center of an Ultra Wormhole vortex, Astral-Naganadel was forged when Necrozma's light-refracting armor fused with Naganadel's interdimensional biology. It serves as the apex predator of the Aetherium's deeper layers.

lore.celestialConcordance: Astral-Naganadel converts chaotic void energy into refined multi-colored crystal shards, fueling the engines of the multiversal core.

quantumResonators.name: Prismatic Sting
quantumResonators.description: A focused thrust of refracted light that bypasses all dimensional defenses to strike the target's core essence.

quantumResonators.name: Void Pulse
quantumResonators.description: Emits a shockwave of prismatic energy that destabilizes the surrounding space, slowing all entropic decay.
